2605.18083.title: A Data-Efficient Path to Multilingual LLMs: Language Expansion via Post-training PARAM$Δ$ Integration into Upcycled MoE
2605.18083.paper_summary: Expanding Large Language Models~(LLMs) to new languages is a costly endeavor, demanding extensive Continued Pre-Training~(CPT) and data-intensive alignment. While recent data-free merging techniques attempt to bypass alignment by fusing a multilingual CPT-enhanced model with its instruct counterpart, they are plagued by a critical trade-off: mitigating parameter conflicts to preserve original abilities inevitably dilutes new language acquisition, and vice-versa. To resolve this conflict, we introduce \method, which upcycles a dense model into a Mixture-of-Experts~(MoE) architecture, allocating different experts to different languages. Alignment ability is then transferred by grafting a MoE-expanded parameter delta~($Δ_{\text{post}}$) to the CPT-enhanced base model, bypassing the complex alignment phase. Experiments demonstrate \method's superiority even against baselines with similar FLOPs or number of parameters; it improves performance on expanded languages while effectively preserving original capabilities. We further show our approach is highly applicable across different models and Post-training deltas.
2605.18083.paper_summary_zh: 擴展大型語言模型（LLMs）到新語言是一項成本高昂的工作，需要大量的持續預訓練（CPT）和數據密集型的對齊。雖然最近的無數據合併技術試圖通過將多語言CPT增強模型與其指令對應模型融合來繞過對齊，但它們面臨一個關鍵的權衡：減少參數衝突以保留原有能力不可避免地會稀釋新語言的獲取，反之亦然。為了解決這一衝突，我們提出了\method，它將一個密集模型升級為混合專家（MoE）架構，將不同的專家分配給不同的語言。然後通過將MoE擴展的參數增量（$Δ_{\text{post}}$）嫁接到CPT增強的基模型上來轉移對齊能力，從而繞過複雜的對齊階段。實驗表明，\method的優越性即使在與類似FLOPs或參數數量的基線相比時也得到了證明；它在擴展語言上的性能有所提升，同時有效保留了原有能力。我們進一步展示了我們的方法在不同模型和後訓練增量中具有高度的適用性。
2605.18083.author: Hao Zhou et.al.
2605.18083.authors: Hao Zhou, Tianhao Li, Zhijun Wang, Shuaijie She, Linjuan Wu, Hao-Ran Wei, Baosong Yang, Jiajun Chen, Shujian Huang
